_comment: Pinned release tag for background-computer-use (github.com/actuallyepic/background-computer-use). Bump only via `/update --bump-bcu`. The /update skill resolves the .dmg/.zip asset URL from the GitHub release JSON and verifies SHA against the `.sha256` companion asset.
notes: Initial pin uses 'latest' as a placeholder. Replace with a specific release tag (e.g. 'v0.3.1') on first /update --bump-bcu run.
